programmes.show_description: Women Who Kill. A chilling look at the work of female killers. They can be as deadly as their male counterparts, but they choose less violent methods. S3, Ep8
A Taste of Poison. Poisoners: devious killers relying on their victim's trust in order to steal their lives. Find out why they don't usually stop at just one kill. S3, Ep9
Watching Dru. Student Dru Sjodin suddenly vanishes after her shift at Victoria's Secret. CCTV footage shows Dru's last movements revealing the chilling reason for her disappearance. S2, Ep5
Watching Amy Lord. 24-year-old former cheerleader Amy Lord goes missing. CCTV footage from ATMs and outside her home captures the moment she was taken by her killer. S2, Ep6

Double Helix. Just a few microscopic cells, from even a single hair or drop of blood, can place a murderer behind bars. What does DNA mean for crime solving today? S1, Ep6
Tangled Web of Clues. Looks at how the type of insects and their stage of development on a dead body can pinpoint the time of death and even identify the victim. S1, Ep7
Operation Goldenrod. In Beirut armed extremists seize a plane and terrorise everyone on board. The CIA undertakes a daring operation to stop the hijackers; but will they succeed? S6, Ep18
Voice of Terror. In the late 1970s, the FBI had knowledge of anti-Castro terrorists operating in the US. Then, a new group appeared, more violent than their predecessors. S7, Ep1
Michelle Gunshon. In December 2004, 38-year-old Michelle Gunshon went missing. Police believed Michelle had been murdered and that their prime suspect was on the run. S5, Ep1
Stranger Comes to Town. When Mandy meets Paul online, he quickly moves to Kentucky so they can marry. But love soon turns to hate when his controlling behaviour turns murderous. S1, Ep2

programmes.show_name: On the Case with Paula Zahn
programmes.show_description: The Smallest Clue. A murdered teenager's body mysteriously turns up in the rural Iowa countryside. Will the smallest clue be the key to bringing her killer to justice? S12, Ep13
The Other Man. In 2014, a student from China is found murdered in Iowa. CCTV footage points to a planned execution and it opens an international investigation. S8, Ep11
Michael Lane. Shana Grice was murdered after being stalked by her ex-boyfriend, Michael Lane. He denied involvement, but experts examine police videos to determine the truth. S3, Ep6
It Could Be Me. Michelle Lira dreams of being a doctor, until one day a rollercoaster romance steers her life in a different direction, straight into a deadly ambush. S7, Ep8
When's Mom Coming Home? After her divorce Joann Albanese meets a new man. But by the time Joann discovers her boyfriend isn't who he claims to be, it's already too late. S7, Ep11

programmes.show_name: Evil Lives Here: Shadows Of Death
programmes.show_description: A Double Life. In rural Missouri, the body of a young woman lies dead on a deserted dirt road only days before her wedding. Police uncover surprising secrets in her fiancé's life. S2, Ep2
Rolandas Poskus/Amanda Playle. Barrister Robert Rinder examines the case of Rolandas Poskus, a man who was found dead in a park in Hull, and Amanda Playle, a woman who was stalked. S5, Ep3
A Date With Dalene. When Dalene Carlson vanishes in the night, CCTV footage reveals several suspects, each with a motive. Can police uncover the truth behind her disappearance? S4, Ep8
The Truth About Blair. A single mother vanishes without a trace from her suburban home, and detectives uncover a web of lies spun by those closest to her. S9, Ep2

programmes.show_name: The Darkest Of Nights: People Magazine Investigates
programmes.show_description: The small town of Craig is shocked when the charred body of Lauri Waterman, a devoted mother, is found. Who could be responsible for this heinous crime?
Breakdown At Daylight. 17-year-old Casey Crowder vanished early one morning when her car ran out of fuel. With no leads, investigators are desperate for any CCTV clues. S3, Ep11
Grave Discoveries. Forensic scientists re-evaluate unsolved crimes and apply new methods to solving them. S3, Ep10
Bad Medicine. A thought-provoking look at how drug trafficking has spawned a violent and deadly criminal underground. S3, Ep12
Driven To The Edge. After dropping her two boys at school in Coral Springs, Florida, Surya Toha vanishes without a trace. Chilling CCTV footage reveals exactly what happened to her. S2, Ep7
Snatched On Camera. 19-year-old student Katie Poirier vanishes while working the graveyard shift at a gas station. CCTV footage reveals an answer - but leaves a community in fear. S2, Ep8

Faces of Tragedy. Forensic sculptors can place a face on an unidentified corpse by recreating a victim's likeness, often leading to a name. S1, Ep8
Without a Trace. A motel clerk disappears, leaving behind a trail of blood. Investigators have their suspect, but without a victim, what can they charge him with? S1, Ep9
Dangerous Case. In the late '70s, a terrorist group is suspected of setting off bombs in major US cities. Their goal: to bring attention to the Puerto Rican independence movement. S7, Ep2
The Great Philby Mob War. Three armed men attack a man and flee the scene. Authorities are unable to identify the assailants but are convinced it was the work of the Mafia. S7, Ep3
Scott Peterson. When Laci Peterson went missing, her husband claimed he last saw her before he went fishing - but his secret mistress exposed his lies. Experts examine his behaviour. S3, Ep10
True Crime. Crime writers know as much about crime as any crime-fighter - or criminal. They can provide as near a first-person account of a murder as is possible. S3, Ep14
Tainted Blood. Police rely on a drop of blood to determine a missing person's fate. Plus, when a woman is hit by a train, is a killer covering his tracks? S6, Ep12
Proof of Innocence. A man is convicted of the murder of a little girl snatched during a game of hide-and-seek. After a 20-year campaign, could new DNA evidence set him free? S6, Ep13
Sins of the Father. The wife of a beloved Methodist minister from Pennsylvania dies in a freak automobile accident. But was is it really an accident or was there foul play? S4, Ep6
Loyalty, Lies, and Loss. A promising young lawyer at Scott Rothstein's law firm is murdered. Investigation into Rothstein reveals a complex Ponzi scheme, duping unwary victims. S2, Ep1
Loved to Death. When a doctor comes home on Valentine's Day to surprise his wife, he instead finds her dead. But as Aphrodite finds out, nothing in this case is what it seems. S3, Ep8
Good People, Badlands. Montana is shocked when mother Susan Casey goes missing after a date. Detectives realize that three men are in her life, any one of whom might be guilty. S4, Ep3
Every Move She Makes. A woman in a small town is the target of a terrifying and insidious stalker. When she goes missing, police must prove she was killed- without a body. S5, Ep10
Broken Commandments. A parishioner is shot to death while working in the office of her church in Bucks County, Pennsylvania. Was she killed at random? S5, Ep4
Killers On The Run. The discovery of a murdered schoolgirl leads to an international manhunt, and the dramatic arrest of her father and stepmother on an airport runway. S1, Ep4

programmes.show_name: New: Killer Confessions: Case Files Of A Texas Ranger
programmes.show_description: After a store robbery turns into abduction, Texas Ranger Jim Holland tracks a suspect to a motel and presses for the missing owner's location. S1, Ep6
Tracie Andrews & Mike Gifford-Hull. What exposed Tracie Andrews' lie that a road rage attack killed her lover? Mike Gifford-Hull's TV plea for his missing wife Farsi hides the truth. S2, Ep2
